shortDescription: Well-maintained 4-bedroom semi in Swansea with updated kitchen and south-facing garden.
fullDescription: Welcome to 33 Windermere Avenue in the vibrant Swansea neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The 4 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
